title: phaseolus peduncularis
intro: Phaseolus peduncularis, also known as the climbing bean or snap bean, is a type of plant belonging to the legume family, characterized by its long, slender pods and edible beans. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus peduncularis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
